summary: Iteration 36 - Complete testing of ClienteWizard questionnaire restructuring and output generation engine. All 9 features tested and PASSED. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

minor.issue: Claude AI generation fails with 'No module named anthropic' - using deterministic fallback
minor.note: Fallback works correctly, AI generation is optional enhancement

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> inside <option>/<select> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: QUIZ_FIELDS STRUCTURE VERIFIED: 7 main questions + 2 conditional fields (canale_principale, vendite_dettaglio)
3 COLORED BLOCKS VERIFIED: IL TUO PROGETTO (#3B82F6 blue), LA TUA ESPERIENZA (#8B5CF6 purple), IL TUO OBIETTIVO (#F59E0B amber)
TEXTAREA FIELDS VERIFIED: 3 textareas in Progetto block (ambito, target, problema) with detailed placeholders
RADIO GROUPS VERIFIED: esperienza (4 options), pubblico (4 options), vendite_online (4 options)
CONDITIONAL FIELD pubblico->canale_principale VERIFIED: Select dropdown appears when selecting 'piccolo', 'medio', or 'grande'
CONDITIONAL FIELD vendite_online->vendite_dettaglio VERIFIED: Textarea appears when selecting 'provato', 'attivo', or 'avanzato'
CONTINUA BUTTON VERIFIED: Disabled when required fields are empty, enabled when form is complete
SCORING ENGINE VERIFIED: 4 dimensions (esperienza, pubblico, vendite, chiarezza_problema) with IDONEO/IDONEO_CON_RISERVA/NON_IDONEO classification
OUTPUT ENDPOINT VERIFIED: GET /api/cliente-analisi/output/{user_id} returns analisi (5 sections), scoring, script_call (6 sections)
PDF ENDPOINT VERIFIED: GET /api/cliente-analisi/pdf/{user_id} returns application/pdf with proper Content-Disposition header
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users via /api/cliente-analisi/register for quiz submission tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: ClienteWizard questionnaire restructuring is complete. Step 2 shows 3 colored blocks with 9 fields total (7 main + 2 conditional). Backend generates scoring (4 dimensions), analisi (5 sections), script_call (6 sections), and PDF via reportlab. AI generation uses deterministic fallback if Claude is unavailable.

feature_1_3_colored_blocks.details: Step 2 shows 3 colored blocks: IL TUO PROGETTO (blue #3B82F6), LA TUA ESPERIENZA (purple #8B5CF6), IL TUO OBIETTIVO (amber #F59E0B)

feature_2_progetto_textareas.details: Blocco Progetto has 3 textareas (ambito, target, problema) with detailed placeholders

feature_3_esperienza_radios.details: Blocco Esperienza has 3 radio groups: esperienza (4 options), pubblico (4 options), vendite_online (4 options)

feature_4_conditional_canale_principale.details: Selecting pubblico 'Sì, tra 1.000 e 10.000' shows conditional field 'Dove sei più attivo?' as <select> dropdown

feature_5_conditional_vendite_dettaglio.details: Selecting vendite 'Sì, ho già clienti' shows conditional field 'Cosa vendi e con quali risultati?' as <textarea>

feature_6_continua_button_disabled.details: Continua button is disabled when required fields are empty

feature_7_backend_mini_quiz.details: POST /api/cliente-analisi/mini-quiz saves 9 fields and returns scoring with classificazione (IDONEO/IDONEO_CON_RISERVA/NON_IDONEO)

feature_8_backend_output.details: GET /api/cliente-analisi/output/{user_id} returns structured analisi (5 sections), scoring, script_call (6 sections)

feature_9_backend_pdf.details: GET /api/cliente-analisi/pdf/{user_id} returns PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf

mocked_apis.ai_generation: AI generation uses deterministic fallback if Claude/Anthropic is unavailable - NOT a mock, it's a designed fallback
mocked_apis.canva_api: MOCKED - Canva API integration is mocked
mocked_apis.kling_ai_api: MOCKED - Kling AI API integration is mocked
